gxpci_nic_comp_t Struct Reference
[gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API]

The structure returned when a host NIC command completes. More...


Data Fields

void * buffer
 Buffer virtual address.
tile_nic_tile_desc_t desc
 Packet descriptor and data transfer status.

Detailed Description

The structure returned when a host NIC command completes.

Examples:

trio/gxpci_host_nic/gxpci_echo_drv_module.c.

Field Documentation

void* gxpci_nic_comp_t::buffer

Buffer virtual address.

tile_nic_tile_desc_t gxpci_nic_comp_t::desc

Packet descriptor and data transfer status.
